description: NinjaTrader 8 is open on the Windows desktop with the Control Center visible. Real daily OHLCV data for AAPL (Apple Inc.) from January 2023 to December 2024 is available in the NinjaTrader data directory. Create a daily chart for AAPL and configure it with an EMA (Period 50), an RSI (Period 14), and a MACD (Fast 12, Slow 26, Smooth 9). Save the workspace.
